title: Live trade on XAU/USD — RR 6.59 target, already +$187 and still running
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Not posting this after. Posting this while it's happening.

Gold has been in a clean downtrend all morning. No reversal signal, no hesitation.

What triggered the entry on the 15M : — Price rejecting a supply zone with EMA 200 pressing from above — Lower highs confirmed — structure fully bearish — Tight entry with minimal stop — 0.165% risk — Target sitting at the next major demand zone 100 points below

Setup : Stop : 0.165% / $7,782 risk Target : 1.086% / $51,270 RR : 6.59

Currently : +$187 and still open.

No move to break even yet. Letting structure do its job.

How do you manage a trade when it's running well — do you trail the stop or let it breathe to target?

comments.author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
comments.body:
Validated this setup with an AI tool I've been building before entering.

Upload a chart screenshot, it reads the structure, scores the setup and identifies SL/TP levels. That's what kept me from exiting too early on this one.

This week on XAU : +$135 RR 2.15 / +$236 RR 2.0 / +$472 RR 3.24 / +$126 RR 2.8 — and this one still running.

Free to try : [https://herculmarket.com](https://herculmarket.com)
